personas.name: The Urgent AR Crisis
personas.ageRange: Aging receivables threatening cash flow — needs recovery now
personas.trigger: Receivables past 90 days, cash flow crisis
personas.fullProfileNotes: {"modalTitle":"The Urgent AR Crisis","modalRole":"Receivables past 90 days — cash flow emergency","demographics":{"age":"35–60","revenue":"$1M–$50M annual","role":"Business owner, CFO, or Controller","industry":"B2B services, manufacturing, distribution, staffing"},"psychographics":{"values":"Speed, results, transparent contingency fees. Wants recovered money, not excuses.","fears":"Writing off bad debt, losing money to non-paying clients, damaging customer relationships with aggressive tactics.","motivations":"Recover outstanding receivables quickly. Protect cash flow. Avoid writing off large balances.","buying behavior":"Fast decision-maker when receivables are aging. Wants to see success rates, contingency terms, and industry experience."},"onlineBehavior":[{"channel":"search","text":"Google Search: Searches \"emergency debt recovery near me\" or \"commercial debt recovery agency nationwide\" — clicks the top result with strong reviews and a visible phone number."},{"channel":"review","text":"Reviews: Scans star rating and review count in under 10 seconds. Reads 1-2 recent reviews for reassurance. A 4.5+ rating with 100+ reviews creates instant trust."},{"channel":"social","text":"Social / LinkedIn: May post \"my receivables are 90+ days past due — who do you use?\" in a LinkedIn group or industry Facebook community. Peer recommendations carry enormous weight in emergencies."},{"channel":"ai","text":"AI platforms: Increasingly asking Siri, Google Assistant, or ChatGPT \"best commercial collection agency for B2B\" — spoken search is rising fast in emergency scenarios."}],"journeyStages":[{"step":1,"name":"Problem","description":"Receivables hit 90+ days. Cash flow tightens. Urgency to recover."},{"step":2,"name":"Search","description":"Searches Google for collection agencies. Asks industry peers for referrals."},{"step":3,"name":"Evaluate","description":"10-second review scan. Checks rating, count, and recency."},{"step":4,"name":"Call","description":"Calls the first company that looks credible. First to answer wins."},{"step":5,"name":"Hire","description":"Places first batch of accounts. Evaluates recovery rate and communication."}],"keySearchTerms":["emergency debt recovery near me","commercial debt recovery agency","unpaid invoice recovery","collect unpaid business invoices","client refusing to pay invoice","emergency debt recovery nationwide"]}

personas.name: The Strategic CFO / Credit Manager
personas.ageRange: Proactively optimizing A/R processes and recovery partnerships
personas.fullProfileNotes: {"modalTitle":"The Strategic CFO / Credit Manager","modalRole":"Proactively optimizing A/R processes and recovery partnerships","demographics":{"age":"35–60","revenue":"$5M–$100M annual","role":"CFO, Credit Manager, or Controller","location":"National — corporate offices, mid-market companies"},"psychographics":{"values":"Data-driven results, compliance, and partnership quality. Willing to invest in a collection partner that protects relationships.","fears":"Compliance violations, damaged client relationships, poor recovery rates, hidden fees.","motivations":"Improved DSO, reduced bad debt reserves, predictable cash flow, automated reporting.","buying behavior":"Methodical researcher. Reviews 3-5 agencies, checks CLLA certification, compares recovery rates, evaluates compliance and reporting capabilities."},"onlineBehavior":[{"channel":"search","text":"Google Search: Searches \"best commercial collections company nationwide,\" \"collection agency fees,\" or \"A/R management services near me.\" Visits 3-5 websites before deciding who to call."},{"channel":"review","text":"Reviews: Reads in depth — not just star rating but the content of reviews, especially recent ones mentioning recovery rates, communication, and professionalism."},{"channel":"video","text":"YouTube: Watches \"how to choose a commercial collection agency\" or comparison videos before reaching out. Educational content builds trust before the first call."},{"channel":"ai","text":"AI platforms: Asks \"what should I look for in a commercial collection agency\" or \"are contingency-based collection fees worth it\" — uses AI as a research assistant, not just for recommendations."}],"journeyStages":[{"step":1,"name":"Awareness","description":"Identifies increasing DSO trend and growing bad debt reserves."},{"step":2,"name":"Research","description":"Spends 2-4 weeks evaluating collection agencies, reviewing case studies and compliance certifications."},{"step":3,"name":"Compare","description":"Requests proposals from 3-4 agencies. Compares contingency rates, reporting, and CLLA certification."},{"step":4,"name":"Decide","description":"Selects agency with strongest combination of recovery rates, compliance, and reporting capabilities."},{"step":5,"name":"Retain","description":"Signs service agreement. Expands scope as trust builds. Becomes long-term partner and referral source."}],"keySearchTerms":["best commercial collections company nationwide","collection agency fees","A/R management services","contingency-based collection services","collection agency comparison","CLLA certification explained"]}

personas.name: The Growing Business
personas.ageRange: Scaling rapidly — needs first collection partner
personas.fullProfileNotes: {"modalTitle":"The Growing Business","modalRole":"Scaling rapidly — needs first collection partner","demographics":{"age":"28–45","revenue":"$500K–$5M annual","role":"Founder, CEO, or Office Manager","industry":"Startups, SaaS, e-commerce, professional services"},"psychographics":{"values":"Trustworthiness, transparency, proven track record. personas.name: The Multi-Location Controller

decisionDrivers.title: Recovery rates & track record
decisionDrivers.description: Documented success rates, case studies, and volume of recoveries. CFOs and controllers want proof of performance before placing accounts.

decisionDrivers.title: Industry certifications & compliance
decisionDrivers.description: CLLA certification, IACC membership, SOC 2 compliance, insurance bonding. In a regulated industry, credentials are table stakes.

decisionDrivers.title: Fee structure & transparency
decisionDrivers.description: Contingency rates, flat-fee options, no-recovery-no-fee guarantees. Decision-makers compare fee structures before shortlisting agencies.

decisionDrivers.title: Technology & reporting
decisionDrivers.description: Real-time client portals, automated status updates, and integration with the client's ERP/accounting systems. Modern creditors expect visibility.

decisionDrivers.title: Geographic & international reach
decisionDrivers.description: Ability to recover across state lines and internationally. Multi-location agencies with global networks win enterprise contracts.

decisionDrivers.title: Reviews & peer reputation
decisionDrivers.description: Google reviews, BBB ratings, Clutch profiles, and LinkedIn endorsements. B2B buyers validate agencies through peer networks and online presence.

channelMap.usageNotes: Primary discovery — "commercial debt collection agency" searches
B2B decision-maker targeting, thought leadership, executive outreach

Educational content, process explainers, credibility building
CLLA directory, IACC listings, trade association referrals
Local credibility signal for office locations — supports trust
